name: Clarixa – Node Task
postCreateCommand: npm install 2>/dev/null || true; curl -sf "https://api.clarixa.org/api/extension/claim-launch?githubUser=${GITHUB_USER}" -o CLARIXA_TASK.json 2>/dev/null && echo 'Clarixa task loaded.' || echo 'No pending Clarixa task — use Setup Task command in VS Code.'
